title: Diplolepis viridis

intro: Diplolepis viridis, also known as green oak gall, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cynipidae, a group of wasp-induced galls found on oak trees. The health benefits of Diplolepis viridis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions.
